title: Strong style
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Cleanup|Awkwardly worded throughout.}}
{{LightsaberForm

{{Quote|Uses powerful strikes to batter through defenses. This style incorporates great range and power, but often leaves the Jedi open to attack.|Description of the strong style|<ref name="Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''strong style''' of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] was a style used by both [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] during the [[New Republic era]], including [[Kyle Katarn]], [[Desann]], and possibly [[Jaden Korr]].

==Description==
[[File:Strong.jpg|thumb|left|[[Kyle Katarn]] in the basic stance of the strong style.]]

The strong style was based primarily on wide, powerful strikes to batter through an opponent's defenses, sacrificing speed for unrivaled power.

It could inflict more damage than the other lightsaber forms of its time which, coupled with its range, made it especially effective against single opponents armed with melee weapons. This style was quite destructive, and if a practitioner was presented with an opening, they would almost always land a devastating blow.<ref name="Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref><ref name="Jedi Academy" />

Utilizing the strong style often left one open to counterattacks, putting them at a disadvantage in terms of speed comparisons against faster opponents, although a sufficiently skilled practitioner could mitigate this. It was also not suited for deflecting blaster shots as the stance required that the user shift the blade quite a bit to cover his body. Thus, it was almost solely utilized in lightsaber combat.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" /><ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Applications==
[[File:Kyle_desann.jpg|thumb|right|[[Desann]] using the strong style against [[Kyle Katarn]].]]
{{Quote|Come get me, Jedi!|The signature taunt of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], who were known to use the strong style|<ref name="Jedi Academy" />}}
Users of the strong style typically utilized an aggressive stance, the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] held high and back, ready to deliver wide, powerful swings. Practitioners with remarkable physical strength such as [[Desann]] used a one-handed variant of this style to great effect.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

The strong style emphasized offense, as the stance and windup time for each swing left the user very open to attack. Defense was limited to the user swinging their blade to intercept and overpower their opponent's strike, or blocking and then disarming the opponent, usually with a sharp spin of the blade. Due to being powerful but slow, this style benefited considerably from the use of [[Force speed/Legends|Force speed]].

The style shared some features with other aggressive styles associated with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]—especially the strength-oriented [[Form V/Legends|Djem So]]. It also displayed similarities to the Juyo subset of [[Form VII/Legends|Form VII]], which likewise sacrificed defense for the sake of a more powerful offense, the wide sweeps of [[Form I/Legends|Shii-Cho]], and [[Form II/Legends|Makashi]] for its precise attacks. Elements of [[Form IV/Legends|Ataru]] also seemed to be incorporated, most notably its opening stance.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
